testcase.name: test_delivery_with_debit_note_charges_customer
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_239_debit_notes_delivery.py:159: in test_delivery_with_debit_note_charges_customer assert r.status_code in (200, 201), r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Warehouse 'Bangalore Warehouse' tracks batches — please pick a production batch for: 20d525e8-c4af-4f40-965a-549dcd50c0a9"} E assert 400 in (200, 201) E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_debit_note_status_after_apply
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_239_debit_notes_delivery.py:184: in test_debit_note_status_after_apply assert dn["debit_note_number"] not in nums, \ E AssertionError: Fully-applied DN still appears in for-account list: ['DN-2026-0001', 'DN-2026-0002', 'DN-2026-0003', 'DN-2026-0004', 'DN-2026-0005'] E assert 'DN-2026-0005' not in ['DN-2026-0001', 'DN-2026-0002', 'DN-2026-0003', 'DN-2026-0004', 'DN-2026-0005']
